title: Natural Soy Wax Citronella Candles Outdoor/Indoor | Long-Lasting for Garden, Camping, Picnic | Essential Oil Aromatherapy Citronella Candle Outdoor | Gardening Gifts & Presents for Women

COMPACT & PORTABLE---This glass jar candle is medium-sized, enables you to carry it wherever you go, enjoy patio dining, gardening, picnics, family reunions, camping, listening to Jazz, relaxing by the pool, rooftop celebrations and etc.
BEST SUMMER COMPANION - Whether you're entertaining indoors, outdoors, garden, pond, patio, park, campsite or the beach, put this citronella bucket nearby to enjoy your beautiful summertime.

Place the outdoor candles in backyard, patio dining, garden, picnic, pool, camping, family reunions inside or outside, It can help you calm the mind and relieve stress. 100% SOY WAX Pure plant citronella essential oil and lead-free core Burning cleaner and longer without black smoke LONG-LASTING BURNING 3.9oz*6 Long-lasting burning of 120 hours guaranteed to bring you maximized relaxation. ENJOY SUMMER Perfect for camping, travel, barbecue, picnics, backyard, bedroom, indoor& outdoor places use. This scented candle is also a summer gift option. ENJOY SWEET SUMMER TIME TIPS The container of this lemongrass candle is glass product. The candle will be hot when it is lit. Do not touch it when it is burning and within one hour after it is extinguished. Please use it on the surface of heat-resistant furniture, or put it on a thermal pad to avoid damaging the furniture. Don't burn candles out of sight. Keep away from children, pets, and any flammable materials when the candle is burning.
